rate_hz.label: Integration Rate
rate_hz.description: How often to integrate the latest Twist into the running pose.

frame.label: Twist Frame
frame.description: body: linear/angular velocities are interpreted in the current pose's frame (forward = where the EE is pointing). world: velocities apply to fixed world axes.

require_seed.label: Require Seed Pose
require_seed.description: If true, no target_pose is emitted until a seed_pose has been received. Prevents the integrator from publishing (0,0,0) before it's anchored.

require_enable.label: Require Enable
require_enable.description: If true, velocity is treated as zero whenever enable=false (deadman). On the falling edge, the integrator re-snaps to the last seed_pose so a re-enable starts cleanly.

ws_min_x.label: Workspace Min X
ws_min_x.description: Optional lower bound on integrated X position. Leave empty to disable.

ws_max_x.label: Workspace Max X
ws_max_x.description: Optional upper bound on integrated X position. Leave empty to disable.

ws_min_y.label: Workspace Min Y
ws_min_y.description: Optional lower bound on integrated Y position. Leave empty to disable.

ws_max_y.label: Workspace Max Y
ws_max_y.description: Optional upper bound on integrated Y position. Leave empty to disable.

ws_min_z.label: Workspace Min Z
ws_min_z.description: Optional lower bound on integrated Z position. Leave empty to disable.

ws_max_z.label: Workspace Max Z
ws_max_z.description: Optional upper bound on integrated Z position. Leave empty to disable.
